rationale: Archi Travel Guide requires a high-trust, premium editorial feel. The 'Organic & Earthy' archetype in a light theme provides the warmth of Italian heritage using ivory, terracotta, and olive, while avoiding cold tech aesthetics. This builds a trustworthy, practical, and inviting atmosphere for travelers.

typography.notes: Headings must use Cormorant Garamond for a premium magazine aesthetic. Body text uses Manrope for extreme legibility in long-form editorial content. Avoid Inter or Roboto entirely.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical web apps to let editorial content breathe.

header.style: Crystal Glassmorphism over hero, Solid Ivory elsewhere
header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E2DFD8]/50

destination_card.style: Large editorial focus, image-heavy with gradient overlays
destination_card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#2C2C2A]/80 via-transparent to-transparent

travel_tool_card.classes: rounded-2xl border border-[#E2DFD8] bg-[#FDFBF7] p-8 shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md

article_layout.content: lg:col-span-6 prose prose-stone prose-lg max-w-none prose-headings:font-serif prose-headings:font-medium

advertisement_label.classes: text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-[#575754] border-b border-[#E2DFD8] pb-1 mb-4 block

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 rounded-full bg-[#C86B53] text-[#FDFBF7] font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#A85540] data-testid='btn-primary'
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 rounded-full border-2 border-[#2C2C2A] text-[#2C2C2A] font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-[#2C2C2A] hover:text-[#FDFBF7] data-testid='btn-secondary'
buttons.link: inline-flex items-center text-[#C86B53] font-medium hover:text-[#A85540] underline-offset-4 hover:underline data-testid='btn-link'

inputs.classes: w-full rounded-xl border border-[#E2DFD8] bg-[#FDFBF7] px-4 py-3 text-base focus:border-[#C86B53] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C86B53]

motion.hover_effects: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-1) for tools, slow scale (duration-700) for destination images.

hero_background.description: Curving road through rolling hills at sunset in Tuscany. Ideal for the main homepage hero.

destination_siena.description: Tall clock tower architecture in Siena. Use for the Siena destination card.

travel_tools_flatlay.description: Passport and sunglasses on a world map. Perfect for the Travel Tools section or featured article header.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided. Do not invent generic tech blues, purples, or teals.
Apply `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements, navigation links, and buttons.
Ensure 'Advertisement' regions are clearly labeled using the specified `advertisement_label` classes.
Do NOT use 'Inter' or 'Roboto'. Set up 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Manrope' for body copy via Google Fonts or similar.
Use Shadcn UI for complex interactive tools (e.g., Select, Dialog) but strip Vercel-like styling and apply the 'Tactile Bento' styling.
Hero overlays must be gradients (e.g., `bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent`) at the bottom for text contrast, NOT flat 50% opacity blankets over the entire image.
